databases.name: SQL_Inventory_DB
databases.query: SELECT Product_ID FROM Product WHERE Product_Name = 'Webcam HD';

databases.name: Postgres_Sales_DB
databases.query: SELECT o.customer_id, SUM(o.order_amount) AS total_order_amount FROM "Order" o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.product_id = {{SQL_Inventory_DB.Product_ID}} AND o.customer_id IN (SELECT Customer_ID FROM {{Mongo_Customer_Address}}) GROUP BY o.customer_id;
